narration: Science has a clearer story about DNA repair pathways than social media does.

narration: Our DNA is constantly under attack. From UV rays to pollution, it’s a battleground.
visual_description: Context visual: Our DNA is constantly under attack. From UV rays to pollution, it’s a battleground.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Our DNA is constantly under attack. From UV rays to pollution, it’s a battleground.

narration: But don’t worry! Cells have repair pathways, like a superhero team, fixing the damage.
visual_description: Escalation visual: But don’t worry! Cells have repair pathways, like a superhero team, fixing the damage.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: But don’t worry! Cells have repair pathways, like a superhero team, fixing the damage.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: But don’t worry! Cells have repair pathways, like a superhero team, fixing the damage.

narration: There are several pathways—base excision repair, nucleotide excision repair, and more—each with unique roles.
visual_description: Evidence visual: There are several pathways—base excision repair, nucleotide excision repair, and more—each with unique roles.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: There are several pathways—base excision repair, nucleotide excision repair, and more—each with unique roles.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: There are several pathways—base excision repair, nucleotide excision repair, and more—each with unique roles.

narration: But here’s the twist: not all repairs are perfect. Sometimes, mutations slip through.
visual_description: Pattern Interrupt visual: But here’s the twist: not all repairs are perfect. Sometimes, mutations slip through.

ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Pattern Interrupt visual: But here’s the twist: not all repairs are perfect. Sometimes, mutations slip through.

narration: These mutations can lead to diseases, including cancer. Understanding repair pathways is crucial in medicine.
